name: GOLFTEC Cary
about: GOLFTEC Cary is a golf instruction and technology center focused on data-driven improvement. It uses advanced motion measurement technology, including OPTIMOTION and launch monitors, to analyze swings and provide personalized coaching for players of all levels. The facility offers golf lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships, with an emphasis on translating practice into real on-course results. Pricing is based on lesson packages or individual sessions, with a 30-day refund policy available for lesson plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides detailed swing analysis for precise feedback
Personalized coaching creates custom lesson and practice strategies for individual improvement goals
On-course lessons help students apply swing improvements in real-world playing conditions

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service is mentioned.
No on-site alcohol service is mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a product offered and used in their system.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings. However, you are welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a food and drink service, so it is recommended to contact the center directly for their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, practice, and fittings rather than full course simulation. The time for a simulated round is not specified.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and technology designed to make learning golf engaging for young players.
